title: Los Animales del Zoológico
learningObjectives: Recognize and name common zoo animals in Spanish
Develop vocabulary for animal features and behaviors

seo.metaTitle: Los Animales del Zoológico - Free Spanish Book for Kids
seo.metaDescription: Interactive Spanish book teaching zoo animal names and sounds for preschoolers ages 2-5. Learn león, elefante, mono, jirafa, and more! Free online reading.

culturalNotes: Zoo animals are universally familiar to children and provide excellent vocabulary building. The book incorporates both animal names and descriptive adjectives.
parentTips: After reading, ask your child to make the animal sounds! Visit a local zoo and practice naming animals in Spanish. Draw pictures of favorite animals together.
